caption: The video captures a scene at an airfield where a large, white aircraft with purple accents is taxiing on the runway. The aircraft, marked with "POLSKA" on its side, appears to be preparing for takeoff or has just landed. In the background, two helicopters are visible, one of which is in motion, creating a dynamic contrast with the stationary plane. A red and white striped tower stands prominently behind the helicopters, adding to the aviation setting. The overcast sky suggests cloudy weather conditions, contributing to the overall atmosphere of the scene. The camera remains focused on the aircraft as it moves along the runway, providing a clear view of its features and surroundings.
